summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Casa Juan restaurant website. All backend APIs working correctly and frontend functionality fully operational with multi-language support, reservation system, and menu display.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responds correctly
Menu API returns 8 items with multilingual support (ES/EN/DE)
Time slots API returns lunch and dinner slots correctly
Reservation creation, retrieval, and deletion work perfectly
Invalid reservation data properly rejected with 422 status
Homepage loads with correct header background (#1A1A1A)
Language selector switches between ES/EN/DE successfully
Navigation scroll to menu section works
Menu items display with prices in correct format
Time and guest selectors function properly
Reservation form accepts all required fields
Reservation submission creates backend reservation successfully
Success page displays after reservation submission

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI components and integrations working
